title: Lifecycle Safety Negative and Boundary Gate

sources.reason: Safety negative and boundary gate requirements.

riskAssessment.reason: Safety gate must fail closed on silent overwrite/delete, unconfirmed operations, drift, and forged execution evidence.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized the complete serial remediation plan, including governance changes.

preReviewWarnings: Any negative test failure blocks release and final plan cleanup.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Negative cases fail closed with state, reason, evidence, resume condition, and policy reference.
Positive legal no-op, documentation, sandbox mock, and cancellation cases pass.
Make/CI, Summary, and Cockpit evidence remain reviewable.
Safety regression tests pass before release work begins.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: Lifecycle safety requires executable proof that dangerous ambiguity, drift, unconfirmed actions, and evidence overclaims cannot pass.
constraints: Negative paths fail closed and expose resume conditions.
Tests must distinguish safe no-op/documentation/mock/cancel paths.
Any failure blocks release and plan cleanup.
intent.rationale: A dedicated negative gate prevents safety regressions from being hidden by positive-path coverage.

rawUserRequest: 走完当前文档的流程；按计划逐个工单执行完整生命周期，包括 PR、合并、清理分支，直到全部工单完成。用户已授权所需确认范围。

declaredIntent.summary: Add a fail-closed lifecycle safety negative and boundary regression gate.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Dangerous overwrite/delete, drift, unconfirmed, and forged evidence cases fail closed.
Legal no-op, documentation, sandbox mock, and cancellation cases pass.
Failure contains state, reason, evidence, resume condition, and policy reference.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized the complete serial remediation plan, including governance policy changes.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
